DECLARATION OF DAVID P. LANE IN SUPPORT OF REPLY TO MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT LENK, LYNN THOMPSON LENK, EDWARD C.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LYNN LENK AND EDWARD LENK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. THE ACTION IS TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE BASED ON THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES IN THAT FORUM, BUT NO SUCH MOTION IS PENDING IN THIS COUNTY. SANCTIONS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT ACT UNREASONABLY. Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Continued To Feb-10-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID LANE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY V. DEBERNARD, TEL. NO. 788-1314 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS LYNN LENK AND EDWARD LENK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is Granted. The action is transferred to Contra Costa County. Plaintiff may file a motion to change venue based on the convenience of witnesses in that forum, but no such motion is pending in this county. Sanctions denied. Plaintiff did not act unreasonably. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

ATTY. DAVID P. LANE, TEL. NO. 788-1313 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS LYNN LENK AND EDWARD LENK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 24, 2011.
